description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test, using the default image microsoft/dotnet:1.1-sdk and a global variable Solution set to CityOS.sln. In the build stage add a build job that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, changes directory to CityOS.Web, lists files, builds the Docker image with docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/panchoaby/cityos CityOS.Web/. and pushes it to registry.gitlab.com/panchoaby/cityos. In the test stage add a test job that runs dotnet restore, dotnet test CityOS.Test/CityOS.Test.csproj, and dotnet publish -c Release -o out using the .NET SDK image. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
